strengths: Demonstrated proper traction setup technique by positioning hands appropriately on the gauze
Maintained steady hand positioning throughout the manipulation phase
weaknesses: Failed to initiate any cutting action despite proper setup
Did not use laparoscopic instruments to perform the required circle cutting
Task remained incomplete with zero cutting progress observed

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction with the Maryland forceps.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and cutting initiation.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not use laparoscopic instruments properly

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on transitioning from setup to active cutting with proper instrument coordination. Your traction technique is solid, but you need to engage the cutting instruments to complete the task.
